name: The Transformation Flashlight
description:
The Transformation Flashlight! Whatever you shine it at gets transformed into Whatever the owner wants. an orange may turn into gold, or start talking. Sure turning that old ass car into a Porsche makes sense, but you could also do an Icecream truck, or a blank check, or even a person.

This is a quick and sloppy bot, not my best work but hey, it's entertaining and seems to work just fine. Enjoy.
creator: Mason8tor
